## Checklist

- [ ] Cog compiles (`python3 -m py_compile cogs/your_cog.py`)
- [ ] Bot starts and loads the affected cog(s) without errors
- [ ] Updated `.env.example` if new environment variables were added
- [ ] Updated README if commands, configuration, or architecture changed
- [ ] Follows code style (PEP 8, async-first, atomic state writes)
